name: New York City subway and bus fares (2026)

claims.claim_text: New York City subway and local/limited/Select Bus Service bus base fare

sources.title: MTA — Subway and bus fares
sources.note: Official page states the fare is $3 for most riders on subways and local, limited, rush, and Select Bus Service buses.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.

claims.claim_text: New York City express bus base fare

sources.title: MTA — Subway and bus fares
sources.note: Official page states express buses cost $7.25.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.

claims.claim_text: OMNY weekly cap for NYC subway and local bus fares

sources.title: MTA — Subway and bus fares
sources.note: Official page states riders will not spend more than $35 a week on subway and local bus fares using the same OMNY payment method.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.

claims.claim_value: One free transfer within two hours

sources.title: MTA — Subway and bus fares
sources.note: Official page states riders get one free transfer within two hours of paying their fare.

verification_event.note: Read directly from Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) official fare page on 2026-06-29. Final human approval pending.
